originalTitle: SPIDER-MAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Easter Eggs & Details You Missed!
content: Erik Voss from New Rockstars breaks down the new trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day! Head to https://betterhelp.com/newrockstars to get 10% off your first month of therapy with our sponsor, BetterHelp. Because no one should have to go through anything alone. BetterHelp is here, With You. The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them. Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW. July 31, 2026 It’s a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see. The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them. Directed by: Destin Daniel Cretton Written by: Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: Stan Lee and Steve Ditko Produced by: Kevin Feige, p.g.a. Amy Pascal, p.g.a. Avi Arad Rachel O’Connor, p.g.a. Oscorp?? 25:02 - Savage Hulk Returns in Brand New Day 28:02 - "Challengers" Writer Saved a Scene 32:32- Oscorp in BND? chineseContent: 《新摇滚明星》的埃里克·沃斯详细介绍了《蜘蛛侠全新一天》的新预告片！前往 https://betterhelp.com/newrockstars，在我们的赞助商 BetterHelp 的帮助下，第一个月的治疗可享受 10% 的折扣。因为没有人应该独自经历任何事情。 BetterHelp 就在这里，与您同在。世界可能已经忘记了彼得·帕克，但他没有忘记他们。观看 #SpiderManBrandNewDay 的新预告片，将于 7 月 31 日在影院上映。门票现已发售。 2026 年 7 月 31 日对于彼得·帕克来说这是全新的一天。作为蜘蛛侠，在一个不记得他的世界里全职打击犯罪，以及看着他的老朋友在没有他的情况下继续前进的压力，引发了彼得的改变，他可能无法控制。但这种转变也可能是唯一能够阻止对这座城市和他所爱的人的令人震惊的新威胁——一个没人能看到的强大恶棍。世界可能已经忘记了彼得·帕克，但他没有忘记他们。导演：德斯汀·丹尼尔·克雷顿 编剧：克里斯·麦肯纳、埃里克·萨默斯和贾斯汀·库里茨克斯 改编自漫威漫画书，作者：斯坦·李和史蒂夫·迪特科 制片人：凯文·费奇，p.g.a.艾米·帕斯卡，职业选手阿维·阿拉德·雷切尔·奥康纳，职业选手执行制片人：Louis D’Esposito David Cain 演员：Tom Holland Zendaya Sadie Sink Jacob Batalon Jon Bernthal Tramell Tillman Michael Mando 和 Mark Ruffalo 非最终版 MARVEL 及所有相关角色名称：© & ™ 2026 MARVEL 这部电影被美国电影协会评为 PG-13，原因如下：动作/暴力序列和一些语言。 #Sony #SonyPictures #SpiderMan #Marvel #TomHolland #Zendaya #SadieSink #JacobBatalon #JonBernthal #TramellTillman #MichaelMando #MarkRuffalo #destindanielcretton 章节：00:00 - 介绍 00:58 - 蝎子终于回来了 02:17 - 全新一天 Ti
